output:
Fixed two issues from quality review:

1. HIGH: workflow-runner.ts inspect callback now filters by rootActorRef. Gate/child machine snapshots no longer drive workflow-viz. `rootActorRef = actor` captured after createActor(); guard added before snapshotToPosition(). Wrong 'no root-actor filter' test replaced with correct 'root-actor filter' test in workflow-inspect.test.ts.

2. MEDIUM: run.ts dispatch-error handler now distinguishes gate errors (storyKey contains ':') from terminal story errors (no ':'). Gate errors use type:'warn' and do NOT mark story as failed. Story errors use type:'fail' and mark story failed (unchanged). New test in run.test.ts verifies gate dispatch-error uses 'warn' and leaves story status unchanged.

Result: 5286 tests pass (198 files), build succeeds.
